title: Multilingual Video Dubbing Platform
excerpt: Multilingual speech pipeline for ASR, duration-aware translation, and neural voice cloning.

title: WhatsApp Automation & Engagement Platform
excerpt: A microservices-based platform for automating WhatsApp interactions, including scheduled messaging, user segmentation, and analytics dashboards.

title: RAG-Powered Knowledge Base Chatbot
excerpt: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation chatbot that integrates Claude (Haiku) with ChromaDB and Redis to provide accurate and context-aware responses from a custom knowledge base.

title: StreamVeda: Youtube Video Streaming Platform
excerpt: A YouTube stream scheduling and content management platform to automate publishing and content operations for multiple YouTube channels.

title: Meetly: Video Conferencing & Appointment Booking Platform
excerpt: A video conferencing and appointment booking platform that integrates with Jitsi Meet for seamless virtual meetings with automatic attendance tracking and conference recording.

title: AutoDB Backup: Automated Database Backup System
excerpt: An automated database backup microservice that ensures data integrity and recovery for various database management systems.

title: Zonse Algo: Online Trading & Market Simulation Platform
excerpt: Online Trading & Market Simulation platform with real-time market data, algorithmic trading capabilities, and performance analytics.
